original_text: A padaria da Rua da Bica ficou sem pão de forma às duas da tarde. O padeiro disse que a entrega da farinha atrasou por causa de obras na avenida.
english_text: The bakery on Rua da Bica ran out of sliced bread at two in the afternoon. The baker said the flour delivery was late because of roadwork on the avenue.

original_text: 先斗町の小さな喫茶店が今朝十時に開けた。店主は、猫が店の前で眠っていたので、少し遅れたと言った。
english_text: A small café in Pontochō opened at ten this morning. The owner said she was a little late because a cat was sleeping in front of the shop.

original_text: Strætó númer 14 var tólf mínútum of seinn í morgun vegna hálku á Miklubraut.
english_text: Bus number 14 was twelve minutes late this morning because of ice on Miklubraut.

original_text: El mercado de Benito Juárez cerró una hora antes hoy porque una de las vendedoras de quesillo se fue al bautizo de su nieta.
english_text: The Benito Juárez market closed an hour early today because one of the quesillo sellers went to her granddaughter's baptism.

original_text: Kalamaja kooli esimese klassi lapsed hilinesid täna pool tundi, sest nende õpetaja ratas sai tühjaks.
english_text: The first-graders at Kalamaja school were half an hour late today because their teacher's bicycle got a flat tire.

original_text: Quán phở trên phố Lý Quốc Sư đóng cửa sớm chiều nay vì bà chủ hết hành lá, và chợ gần đó cũng đã bán hết.
english_text: The phở shop on Lý Quốc Sư street closed early this afternoon because the owner ran out of scallions, and the market nearby had sold out too.

original_text: Um funicular dos Guindais parou durante vinte minutos esta manhã. Um passageiro tinha deixado um guarda-chuva encravado na porta.
english_text: The Guindais funicular stopped for twenty minutes this morning. A passenger had left an umbrella jammed in the door.

original_text: Na Kazimierzu kwiaciarka przy ulicy Miodowej sprzedała ostatnie tulipany o jedenastej rano. Powiedziała, że dziś rano wszyscy kupowali żółte.
english_text: In Kazimierz, the florist on Miodowa street sold the last tulips at eleven in the morning. She said everyone was buying yellow ones today.

original_text: 오늘 아침 종로의 한 분식집은 김밥 재료가 떨어져서 한 시간 늦게 문을 열었다. 주인은 시장에서 시금치가 너무 비쌌다고 말했다.
english_text: A small kimbap shop in Jongno opened an hour late this morning because it had run out of ingredients. The owner said spinach was too expensive at the market.

original_text: Kadıköy'deki balıkçılar bugün öğleden önce tezgâhlarını topladı. Sabah denizde rüzgâr çok sertti ve tekneler erken döndü.
english_text: The fishmongers in Kadıköy packed up their stalls before noon today. The wind at sea was too rough this morning, and the boats came back early.

original_text: Kallion kirjaston aukioloa siirrettiin tunnilla, koska virkailija oli jäänyt jumiin hissiin. Kaikki pääsivät kuitenkin ulos hyväntuulisina.
english_text: The Kallio library opened an hour later today because a clerk had got stuck in the lift. Everyone came out in good spirits, though.

original_text: Sur le Vieux-Port, un marchand de savon a fermé sa boutique plus tôt parce que son chat s'était endormi dans la caisse.
english_text: On the Old Port, a soap seller closed his shop early because his cat had fallen asleep in the till.

original_text: Το φούρνο στην οδό Παύλου Μελά σήμερα δεν είχε τυρόπιτες μετά τις δέκα το πρωί. Ο φούρναρης είπε ότι τα παιδιά του σχολείου τις αγόρασαν όλες.
english_text: The bakery on Pavlos Melas street had no cheese pies after ten this morning. The baker said the schoolchildren had bought them all.

original_text: Một tiệm may trên phố Trần Phú nghỉ sớm hôm nay vì bà chủ phải đi đón cháu gái từ trường.
english_text: A tailor shop on Trần Phú street closed early today because the owner had to pick up her granddaughter from school.

original_text: En el mercado de San Pedro, una vendedora de panes chutas se quedó sin género antes de las nueve. Dijo que hoy los pedidos para bautizos eran muchos.
english_text: At the San Pedro market, a seller of chuta bread ran out before nine. She said there were a lot of orders for baptisms today.

original_text: Op de Markt stopte een paard met koets tien minuten stil. De koetsier wachtte tot een kind zijn ballon van de kasseien had opgeraapt.
english_text: On the Markt a horse and carriage stood still for ten minutes. The driver waited until a child had picked up his balloon from the cobblestones.

original_text: A busker on Shop Street packed up early this afternoon. She told passers-by her fiddle had gone out of tune in the damp, and she'd rather not play it sorry.
ვერის უბანში პატარა საცხობი დილით გვიან გაიღო. მეცხვარემ თქვა, რომ წუხელ ელექტროობა წავიდა და ცომი კარგად ვერ ამოვიდა.
english_text: A small bakery in the Vera district opened late this morning. The baker said the power had gone out last night and the dough didn't rise well.

original_text: පෙට්ටා වෙළඳපොළේ කිරිපිටි සාප්පුවක් අද උදේ වහලා තිබුණා. හිමිකරු කිව්වා ඔහුගේ දියණියගේ පන්ති පැවැත්වීමට ඔහු යන්නැයි.
english_text: A milk-powder shop in the Pettah market was closed this morning. The owner said he had gone to his daughter's school for parents' day.

original_text: El ascensor Concepción estuvo parado una hora esta mañana. Un señor había dejado una caja de naranjas apoyada contra la puerta.
english_text: The Concepción funicular was stopped for an hour this morning. A man had left a crate of oranges leaning against the door.

original_text: U Baščaršiji je jedna ćevabdžinica jutros bila zatvorena do deset. Majstor je rekao da mu je sinoć nestalo drva za roštilj.
english_text: A ćevabdžinica in Baščaršija was closed until ten this morning. The owner said he had run out of firewood for the grill last night.

original_text: Na Tržnici je kmetica iz Škofje Loke prodala ves med do desete ure. Rekla je, da je letos čebelam bolj všeč lipa.
english_text: At the market, a farmer from Škofja Loka had sold all her honey by ten. She said the bees liked the linden blossom better this year.

original_text: På Bryggen regnet det så kraftig at en fiskehandler pakket bort torskene sine før klokka ett. Han sa at turistene hadde gjemt seg i bokhandelen.
english_text: On Bryggen it rained so hard that a fishmonger packed up his cod before one o'clock. He said the tourists had hidden themselves in the bookshop.

original_text: 近江町市場の小さな八百屋さんが、今朝、柿を全部売り切った。店主は、秋は短いからと笑っていた。
english_text: A small greengrocer at Ōmichō market sold out of persimmons this morning. The owner laughed and said autumn is short.

original_text: Sebuah kedai kopi di Lebuh Armenian ditutup awal petang ini kerana tuan punya kehabisan roti bakar. Dia kata anaknya sudah habiskan semua.
english_text: A coffee shop on Lebuh Armenian closed early this afternoon because the owner had run out of toast. He said his son had finished it all.

original_text: En la feria de Tristán Narvaja, un puesto de discos viejos cerró temprano. El vendedor dijo que vendió el único Zitarrosa de vinilo a las once.
english_text: At the Tristán Narvaja fair, a used records stall closed early. The seller said he sold the only Zitarrosa on vinyl at eleven.

original_text: In via Pescherie Vecchie una piccola salumeria ha finito il parmigiano stagionato trenta mesi prima di mezzogiorno. Il proprietario ha detto che una famiglia di Giapponesi ne ha comprato un chilo intero.
english_text: On via Pescherie Vecchie a small deli ran out of thirty-month-aged parmigiano before noon. The owner said a Japanese family bought a whole kilo.

original_text: In het Zuid viel de lift van een oud appartementsgebouw voor twee uur stil. De bewoners namen de trap en niemand leek het erg te vinden.
english_text: In the Zuid district an old apartment building's lift was out for two hours. The residents took the stairs and nobody seemed to mind.

original_text: ร้านข้าวซอยเล็กๆ ใกล้ประตูท่าแพ ปิดเร็วกว่าปกติวันนี้ เจ้าของบอกว่าน้ำมันหอยหมด และตลาดก็ขายหมดแล้ว
english_text: A small khao soi shop near Tha Phae Gate closed earlier than usual today. The owner said the oyster sauce had run out and the market had sold out too.

original_text: На площі Ринок сьогодні вранці одна бабуся продавала сушені яблука. До десятої години вона продала все і пішла додому.
english_text: At the Rynok square this morning an old woman was selling dried apples. By ten she had sold everything and gone home.

original_text: În Piața Unirii, o florăreasă a închis taraba mai devreme pentru că a plecat să ia copilul de la grădiniță. Le-a dat crizanteme rămase vecinilor.
english_text: In Piața Unirii, a flower seller closed her stall early because she went to pick up her child from kindergarten. She gave the leftover chrysanthemums to her neighbours.

original_text: No Pelourinho, uma baiana do acarajé saiu mais cedo hoje porque o vento derrubou o toldo da barraca. Disse que amanhã volta com tudo.
english_text: In Pelourinho, an acarajé vendor left earlier today because the wind knocked down her stall's awning. She said she'll be back tomorrow.

original_text: Užupio kavinėje šįryt buvo nutrūkęs vanduo. Klientai gėrė vaisių arbatą, o savininkas juokavo, kad tai respublikos tradicija.
english_text: A café in Užupis had no water this morning. The customers drank fruit tea, and the owner joked that it was a republic tradition.

original_text: في سوق الناصرة القديم، أغلق بائع الكعك محله قبل الظهر. قال إن الكعك نفد والبائعة الأخرى في السوق أعطته فنجان قهوة بالهيل.
english_text: In the old market of Nazareth, a sesame-bread seller closed his shop before noon. He said the bread had run out and another seller in the market gave him a cup of cardamom coffee.

original_text: في درب الطالعة الصغيرة، فرّان الحي أغلق باب الفرن في الثانية ظهراً. قال إنه لم يتبقَّ خبزٌ إلا رغيف واحد أعطاه لقطة المدخل.
english_text: In Derb Talaa Seghira, the neighbourhood oven closed its door at two in the afternoon. He said there was only one loaf left, and he gave it to the cat by the entrance.

original_text: මහනුවර වෙළඳපොළේ එක් පළතුරු විකුණන්නියක් අද අඹ ඉක්මනින් විකුණා අවසන් කළාය. වැස්සට පෙර තේ කෝප්පයක් බොන්න ඇය ගෙදර ගියාය.
english_text: At the Kandy market, a fruit seller sold out of mangoes quickly today. She went home to have a cup of tea before the rain.

original_text: A poi-wala on 18th June Road in Panaji finished his round an hour early today. He said the rain had started and his basket was getting soft.
At Salamanca Market, a cheesemaker from Bruny Island sold out of a washed-rind wheel by half ten. He said a couple from Launceston had driven down just for it.
Il-pastizzerija ta' Triq ir-Repubblika spiċċatilha l-irkotta qabel nofsinhar. Il-ħobbż tal-ġbejna biss baqa' ftit sal-waqt tal-għeluq.
english_text: The pastizzerija on Republic Street ran out of ricotta before noon. Only a few cheese pastries were left by closing time.

original_text: Na zelenoj pijaci baka iz Zete rano je prodala sav grožđe. Rekla je da ove jeseni ima manje, ali je slađe.
english_text: At the green market, a grandmother from Zeta sold all her grapes early. She said there's less this autumn, but it's sweeter.

original_text: Գում շուկայում մի մրգավաճառ վաղ փակեց կրպակը։ Ասաց, որ թոռնուհին այսօր դպրոցի առաջին օրն է, ու գնում է նրան դիմավորելու։
english_text: At the GUM market a fruit seller closed his stall early. He said it was his granddaughter's first day of school, and he was going to meet her.

original_text: ბულვარზე ღამის მაღაზიამ დილით ცოტა გვიან გაიღო კარი. გამყიდველი ამბობდა, რომ ზღვიდან წუხელ ნისლი მოდიოდა და გვიან დაიძინა.
english_text: A late-night shop on the boulevard opened a little late this morning. The seller said the fog had come in from the sea last night and he had gone to bed late.

original_text: På Vestergade blev en gammel ostebutik lukket en time tidligere. Ejeren tog sin hund med til dyrlægen for årskontrollen.
english_text: On Vestergade an old cheese shop closed an hour early. The owner took his dog to the vet for a yearly check-up.

original_text: Op de Graslei viel een tram stil omdat een meeuw op de bovenleiding zat. De bestuurder wachtte geduldig tot hij wegvloog.
english_text: On the Graslei a tram stood still because a seagull was sitting on the overhead wire. The driver waited patiently until it flew off.

original_text: Сүхбаатарын талбайн ойролцоох жижиг хоолны газар өнөө өглөө хагас цаг оройтож нээгдэв. Эзэгтэй нь зах дээр өндөгийн үнэ дахин өссөн гэж хэлэв.
english_text: A small eatery near Sükhbaatar Square opened half an hour late this morning. The owner said the price of eggs had gone up again at the market.

original_text: Kalaallit Nunaata Brugseniani ullumi unnukkut aalisakkat nungulluinnarput. Niuertup oqarpoq qilalugaq pingaartumik tamanit pisiarineqartoq.
english_text: At the Brugseni shop in Greenland the fish was all gone by evening today. The shopkeeper said everyone had been especially eager to buy narwhal.

original_text: 平江路一家小面馆今早十点就卖完了汤面。老板说昨晚的雨让很多人想吃热的。
english_text: A small noodle shop on Pingjiang Road sold out of soup noodles by ten this morning. The owner said last night's rain had made a lot of people want something warm.

original_text: Na Długim Targu mały sklep z bursztynem otwarto dzisiaj z półgodzinnym opóźnieniem. Właściciel powiedział, że sztormowe morze wyrzuciło dużo bursztynu i musiał go pozbierać rano.
english_text: On the Long Market a small amber shop opened half an hour late today. The owner said the stormy sea had washed up a lot of amber and he had to collect it in the morning.

original_text: Am Kaiser-Josef-Markt hat eine Bäuerin aus der Südsteiermark heute alle Kürbiskerne vor elf verkauft. Sie sagte, heuer sei die Ernte klein, aber sehr dunkel.
english_text: At the Kaiser Josef Market, a farmer from southern Styria sold all her pumpkin seeds before eleven today. She said this year's harvest was small, but very dark.

original_text: Na Obchodnej ulici dnes popoludní malá kaviareň zatvorila skôr. Majiteľka išla pomôcť susede zložiť záclony pred praním.
english_text: On Obchodná Street a small café closed early this afternoon. The owner went to help her neighbour take down the curtains before washing.

original_text: Au marché Mokolo, une vendeuse de plantains a fini son étalage avant midi. Elle a dit que les clientes préféraient aujourd'hui les plantains presque mûrs.
english_text: At Mokolo market, a plantain seller finished her stall before noon. She said the customers preferred almost-ripe plantains today.

original_text: மிஷன் தெருவில் ஒரு சிறிய பூக்கடை இன்று மதியம் சீக்கிரம் மூடப்பட்டது. மல்லிகை பூக்கள் காலை பத்து மணிக்கே தீர்ந்துவிட்டன.
english_text: A small flower shop on Mission Street closed early this afternoon. The jasmine had run out by ten in the morning.

original_text: En el Mercado 4, una señora que vende chipa guazú cerró su puesto antes de las once. Dijo que el horno a leña se había enfriado y prefería no apurarlo.
english_text: At Mercado 4, a woman who sells chipa guazú closed her stall before eleven. She said the wood-fired oven had cooled and she didn't want to rush it.

original_text: Në Pazarin e Ri sot në mëngjes një shitës byreku mbylli dyqanin më herët. Tha se djali i tij kishte kampionatin e shahut në shkollë.
english_text: At the New Bazaar a börek seller closed his shop early this morning. He said his son had the chess championship at school.

original_text: На улице Баумана маленькая пекарня сегодня рано распродала эчпочмаки. Продавщица сказала, что утром приехала большая экскурсия из Елабуги.
english_text: On Bauman Street a small bakery sold out of echpochmak early today. The clerk said a big tour group had come in from Yelabuga in the morning.

original_text: A fiddle shop on Catherine Street opened a bit late this morning. The owner was minding his neighbour's dog while the neighbour was at a funeral in Clare.
Хан Шатыр маңындағы кішкентай нан дүкені бүгін түстен кейін ерте жабылды. Сатушы баласының мектеп концертіне жетуі керек деді.
english_text: A small bread shop near Khan Shatyr closed early this afternoon. The seller said she had to make it to her son's school concert.

original_text: Bretxa merkatuan, arrain-saltzaile batek lehenago itxi zuen postua. Goizean hegoaldeko haizea egin zuen eta arrantzaleek uste baino gutxiago ekarri zuten.
english_text: At the Bretxa market, a fishmonger closed her stall early. The south wind had blown this morning and the fishermen had brought in less than expected.

original_text: A dairy on Dee Street shut its doors ten minutes early today. The owner's cat had brought in a live sparrow, and they were both trying to catch it.
На Старата чаршија една буречара остана без сирење пред пладне. Мајсторот рече дека утрото дошла голема група ученици на екскурзија.
english_text: At the Old Bazaar a börek shop ran out of cheese before noon. The owner said a large group of schoolchildren had come in on a trip that morning.
